creator: luvbeastie@larseighner.com
text:
shells/zsh will not build due to patch error 11.0 STABLE amd 64

system: FreeBSD noos.larseighnerhome.com 11.0-STABLE FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE #3: Sun Apr  2 14:07:33 CDT 2017     toor@noos.6dollardialup.com:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64


===>  License ZSH accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for zsh-5.3.1
===>   zsh-5.3.1_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by zsh-5.3.1_1 for building
===>  Extracting for zsh-5.3.1_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for zsh-5.3.1.tar.xz.
===>  Patching for zsh-5.3.1_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for zsh-5.3.1_1
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to Completion/Unix/Command/_sysctl.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-Completion-Unix-Command-_sysctl failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es)  patch-Completion-BSD-Command-_kld applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/shells/zsh
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/shells/zsh


Rejected Patch:

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #compdef sysctl

 case $OSTYPE in
-  *freebsd<5->.*|freebsd4.[4-9]*)
+  *freebsd<5->.*|freebsd4.[4-9]*|*freebsd[0-9][0-9].*)
     local -a sysctlvars
     sysctlvars=( $(_call_program sysctl-variables sysctl -aN) )
     _arguments -s -A "-*" \
